step_rationale: NADPH oxidase; oxidative stress and ROS in plaque inflammation.
mechanism: CYBA is the core component of NADPH oxidase driving oxidative stress in plaque inflammation and lipid oxidation.

references.title: Integrative analysis of DNA methylation and gene expression reveals key molecular signatures in acute myocardial infarction.
Association between chromosome 9p21 variants and the ankle-brachial index identified by a meta-analysis of 21 genome-wide association studies.
